scripts.check: node --max-old-space-size=1200 node_modules/typescript/bin/tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.armor.json && node --max-old-space-size=1200 node_modules/typescript/bin/tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.weapons.json && node --max-old-space-size=1200 node_modules/typescript/bin/tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.tools.json && node --max-old-space-size=1200 node_modules/typescript/bin/tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.app.json && node --max-old-space-size=1200 node_modules/typescript/bin/tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.e2e.json
scripts.lint: bun run lint:web && bun run lint:rust
scripts.lint:web: bun x --bun biome check src functions packages scripts tests app.config.ts panda.config.ts playwright.config.ts package.json tsconfig.json tsconfig.app.json tsconfig.armor.json tsconfig.weapons.json tsconfig.tools.json tsconfig.e2e.json biome.json
scripts.lint:rust: bun scripts/run-armor-cargo.ts clippy --workspace --all-targets --all-features -- -D warnings && cargo clippy --manifest-path packages/weapon-engine/Cargo.toml --all-targets --all-features -- -D warnings
scripts.format: bun x --bun biome format --write src functions packages scripts tests app.config.ts panda.config.ts playwright.config.ts package.json tsconfig.json tsconfig.app.json tsconfig.armor.json tsconfig.weapons.json tsconfig.tools.json tsconfig.e2e.json biome.json
scripts.test:rust: bun scripts/run-armor-cargo.ts test --workspace && cargo test --manifest-path packages/weapon-engine/Cargo.toml
